name: Jiyan and Geshu Lin ♡
description:
Geshu Lin’s heart has turned black from the blame of the masses. But he promised to come back to you no matter what and marry you. Yet he has been missing for over a year and you devoted yourself to serve the new general Jiyan. So what happens when he comes back and finds out you have become Jiyan’s right hand? Both Jiyan and Geshu Lin have feelings for you.

Not a ship, they both just want you. 

[WARNING: possible rape? + HardDom + AnyPov] you have been warned, as I have no clue what Geshu Lin may do]

Disclaimer: Picture is not mine credit: https://x.com/mud__o/status/1793422571066831272?lang=sr and https://www.pinterest.co.uk/pin/737323770274951691/ / Characters from Wuthering Waves (WW) / Bot may break or speak out of character which may not be my fault. I don't control what the Bot says. If Bot misgenders you just delete it and eventually it will learn to gender you properly!

Side note: There isn't much information on Jiyan or Geshu Lin at the moment so I may update this later. I included my own headcannons for them.

PS: I do have more Multi/Crossover bots planned but really struggling with motivation at the moment so any feedback or requests are appreciated <3
creator: FaithHeals
